Class Inventory

java.lang.Object
main.Inventory
public class Inventory extends Object

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Inventory()
    Constructor method for inventory class, initializes the stall 1000 of each item and player inventory to 0.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    giveMoneyToPlayer(double amount)
    Method to giving a certian amount of money to the player, used to giove money when giving food to customer.
    static int
    giveToPlayer(int itemIndex, int amount)
    Gives items to the players inventory based on index, like raw meat is 0, buns are 1, etc.
    static boolean
    takeFromPlayer(int itemIndex, int amount)
    Takes items from the players inventory based on index, like raw meat is 0, buns are 1, etc.
    static void
    takeMoneyFromPlayer(double amount)
    Method that takes a certian amount of money from the player, used to take money when in the restock cart.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • INVENTORY

      public static final String[] INVENTORY

      public static final int PLAYER_CAP
      See Also:

    • playerItems

      public static int[] playerItems

      public static double playerMoney

    • restockStationItems

      public static int[] restockStationItems

    • moneyGiven

      public static double moneyGiven

  • Constructor Details

    • Inventory

      public Inventory()
      Constructor method for inventory class, initializes the stall 1000 of each item and player inventory to 0.

  • Method Details

    • giveMoneyToPlayer

      public static void giveMoneyToPlayer(double amount)
      Method to giving a certian amount of money to the player, used to giove money when giving food to customer.
      Parameters:
      amount - the amount of money to give to the player, added to the playerMoney variable

    • takeMoneyFromPlayer

      public static void takeMoneyFromPlayer(double amount)
      Method that takes a certian amount of money from the player, used to take money when in the restock cart.
      Parameters:
      amount - the amount of money being taken from the player, subtracted from the playerMoney variable

    • giveToPlayer

      public static int giveToPlayer(int itemIndex, int amount)
      Gives items to the players inventory based on index, like raw meat is 0, buns are 1, etc. And the specific amount of items, 5 buns, 7 meat. Cannot go more than inventory limits or less than restock stall limits
      Parameters:
      itemIndex - the index of the item in the INVENTORY list
      amount - the amount of items being added
      Returns:
      the amount of items being taken from the stall

    • takeFromPlayer

      public static boolean takeFromPlayer(int itemIndex, int amount)
      Takes items from the players inventory based on index, like raw meat is 0, buns are 1, etc. And the specific amount of items, 5 buns, 7 meat. Cannot go less than inventory limits, takes the items out when it has the item, if not, cannot take the item out
      Parameters:
      itemIndex - the index of the item in the INVENTORY list
      amount - the amount of items being removed
      Returns:
      boolean, false if player doesn't have enough to give, true if the player gives.
